guidanceDocuments.title: Amoxicillin food guidance
guidanceDocuments.content: Amoxicillin can be taken with food if it helps reduce stomach upset. Complete the full course exactly as prescribed.

guidanceDocuments.title: Missed dose basics
guidanceDocuments.content: If a dose is missed, take it when remembered unless it is close to the next dose. Do not double doses unless a clinician explicitly instructed that plan.

guidanceDocuments.title: Metformin stomach upset guidance
guidanceDocuments.content: Metformin is commonly taken with meals to reduce gastrointestinal side effects such as nausea or diarrhea.

guidanceDocuments.title: Refill and follow-up reminder guidance
guidanceDocuments.content: Patients on chronic medication should review refill dates, monitor adherence trends, and keep follow-up visits on schedule.

careVisits.summary: Reviewed blood pressure trend and medication adherence. Continued lisinopril and reinforced morning dosing.
nextSteps: Track home blood pressure three times per week
Bring readings to the next visit

careVisits.summary: Evaluated sore throat and started amoxicillin course with food to reduce stomach upset.
nextSteps: Follow up if symptoms persist after day 7

careVisits.summary: Reviewed metformin tolerance and evening meal routine. No dose change today.

prescriptions.rawText: Amoxicillin 500 mg capsule twice daily for 7 days. Take with food and water.
prescriptions.instructions: Take one capsule every 12 hours with food and water for 7 days.
prescriptions.followUpRecommendation: Follow up if symptoms persist after the final dose.

chatHistory.message: Can I take this with food?
Yes. For this seeded prescription, the instruction is to take it with food and water.
What if I miss a dose?
Take it when you remember unless it is almost time for the next scheduled dose. Do not double up.

prescriptions.rawText: Metformin 500 mg tablet once daily with dinner.
prescriptions.instructions: Take one tablet with your evening meal.
prescriptions.followUpRecommendation: Review blood sugar log with your clinician in 4 weeks.

chatHistory.message: Should I take metformin on an empty stomach?
This seeded prescription says to take it with your evening meal, which is commonly done to reduce stomach upset.

prescriptions.rawText: Lisinopril 10 mg tablet once daily every morning.
prescriptions.instructions: Take one tablet every morning at the same time each day.
prescriptions.followUpRecommendation: Monitor blood pressure at home and review readings next month.

chatHistory.message: When should I take this blood pressure medication?
The seeded instructions say to take it every morning at the same time each day.
